user_prompt: The Nephilim Jetfighter requires a preparation
prayer:
Approach the Nephilim Jetfighter with reverence, mechadendrites outstretched in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Anoint its aerofins and thruster vents with sacred oils whilst chanting the Litany of Preparation.
Invoke the dormant Machine Spirit within the Nephilim Jetfighter to stir from slumber.
Calibrate the auspex arrays and ignition coils in harmonious preparation for the void-skies.
Beseech the Omnissiah's blessing upon the Nephilim Jetfighter ere it takes to the empyrean.

user_prompt: How do I bless the thallax for emergency procedure?
prayer:
Gather before the thallax, intoning the Rite of Emergent Fury to awaken its combat protocols.
Sanctify the thallax's neural suppressors with binary incense for the emergency procedure.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the thallax to endure the rigors of hasty reactivation.
Align its weapon-servos and motivator coils whilst reciting the Canticle of Urgent Revival.
Verify the thallax's obedience through diagnostic litanies of the emergency procedure.

user_prompt: Consecrate the orbital strike relay before engagement
prayer:
Kneel in veneration before the orbital strike relay, whispering the Incantation of Celestial Wrath.
Purify its targeting cogitators with sanctified static whilst preparing for engagement.
Invoke the Machine Spirit housed within the orbital strike relay to align with the Omnissiah's aim.
Initiate the engagement sequence through rhythmic binaric prayers of orbital fury.
Consecrate the relay's emitters anew, ensuring flawless communion for the cataclysmic descent.

Present thyself unto the pict-recorder with mech-rosarius aloft in pious activation.
Anoint its optic lenses and data-vaults with chrism oil, invoking the activation rite.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the pict-recorder through the humming Canticle of Vision.
Synchronize its capture servos whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for unerring clarity.
Consecrate the pict-recorder fully ere it chronicles the Omnissiah's manifold glories.

user_prompt: Critical: neutron laser requires a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the neutron laser in solemn procession, mechadendrites tracing warding glyphs.
Commence the sterilization by purging its focusing crystals with ablative sacraments.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the neutron laser to accept this rite of purification.
Incant the Litany of Sterile Radiance over its emitter coils thricefold.
Verify the neutron laser's sanctity through auspex scans of untainted flux.

Encircling the pump, intone the Hymnal of Fluidic Restoration to rouse its vital essence.
Dissect the clogged vanes with sanctified probes during this repair invocation.
Anoint the pump's impeller heart with lubricant chrism, beseeching the Machine Spirit's mercy.
Realign the pressure manifolds whilst chanting the Canticle of Reparative Harmony.
Test the pump's renewed vigor under the Omnissiah's watchful binary gaze.

user_prompt: Help me a cycling the Baneblade
prayer:
Prostrate before the mighty Baneblade, reciting the Grand Litany of Cyclic Renewal.
Initiate the cycling of its colossal reactors with offerings of promethium incense.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Baneblade to cycle through its phases of fury undiminished.
Monitor the turbine hymns and track servos in reverent synchronization.
Conclude the cycling with a benediction upon the Baneblade's adamantium frame.

user_prompt: I need to a shutdown the medicae mechadendrite
prayer:
With solemn mechadendrites, approach the medicae mechadendrite for the rite of shutdown.
Administer the narcotizing canticle to lull its surgical appendages into stasis.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the medicae mechadendrite to slumber peacefully.
Sever power feeds whilst intoning the Litany of Dormant Healing.
Seal the medicae mechadendrite with warding seals under Omnissiah's grace.

user_prompt: Prepare the auto-senses array for diagnostics
prayer:
Attune thyself to the auto-senses array, commencing the Diagnostic Exaltation.
Anoint its sensor nodules with conductive salves for flawless diagnostics.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the auto-senses array through binaric probing.
Cycle through auspex litanies, verifying each optic and vox receptor.
Sanctify the array's findings in the name of the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom.

user_prompt: Urgent plasma cannon a purification needed
prayer:
Incorporate before the plasma cannon, intoning the Purgation of Venting Plasmas.
Purge its containment flasks with sacred venting rites of purification.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the plasma cannon to shed impurities in fiery rebirth.
Recalibrate the gyrometric coils whilst chanting the Canticle of Thermal Absolution.
Bless the plasma cannon's maw, rendered pure for the Omnissiah's wrathful discharge.
